ItacPersonItem.Notes: Joined the Accesi in 1686, in 1694 joined the Impazienti. Between 1694 and 1696 recited Latin verses in the Accademia degli Indivisi. As Accademico Impaziente with nickname Il Trasportato, he contributed to the publication `Le leggi d`Apollo. Versi all`illustriss. e reuerendiss. sig. canonico Alberto conte Fava per la sua laurea in ambe le leggi`. ed. Matteo Clemente Berloni (Bologna: per gli eredi del Sarti, dal Monte delle Scuole, alla Rosa, 1695) - not in BL collection. Joined the Intronati in 1717. See his biography by Marco Catucci, in DBI.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
